title: Mellow Chewy Turkish Apple Pie
description: A bitter, chewy Turkish apple pie that caramelizes the fruit with apple juice and spices for a cozy, vegetarian dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 °C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mix the apple slices with lemon juice, apple juice, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, flour, butter, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt until the apples are evenly coated.
Roll out the puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface to fit the baking tray and cut it into a circle that will surround the apple mixture.
Spread the apple mixture onto the pastry circle leaving a 2 cm border, then fold the pastry edges over the filling for a rustic look.
Brush the pastry surface with a little water to help it brown, then bake for 30 minutes or until the pastry is golden and the apples are caramelized.
Remove the pie from the oven and let it cool on a rack for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm with a dusting of powdered sugar or a scoop of vanilla ice cream if desired.
